In contemporary digital wellness environments, emotional regulation technologies have become increasingly commercialized. Artificial intelligence now mediates how humans breathe, rest, focus, and even feel. From mindfulness apps that count calm min to voice companions offering nightly reassurance, AI has entered the most intimate domain of psychological life—the management of anxiety (Angelucci et al., 202...
